utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 6 items required in the final format: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. All 6 appear in the final property solution. Now check if each is fully specified with details as implied by the format: 
- property: includes selected property with details and price (type, address, price, details) — fully specified.
- financing: includes financing solution with terms (type, loan_amount, down_payment, interest_rate, term, amortization, arrangement_fee) — fully specified.
- legal_services: includes legal services with costs (package, cost, details) — fully specified.
- moving_services: includes moving arrangements with costs (survey type and cost; moving type, cost, details) — fully specified.
- setup_services: utility and setup services (package, cost, details) — fully specified.
- total_budget: complete cost breakdown (purchase_price, total_closing_costs, total_funds_required) — provided; while not itemizing every fee, it is a complete summarized breakdown consistent with the format.
All 6 items are present and contain the required details.
